'''mataza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uintathere|uintathere]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uintathere|uintathere]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mataza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mætæzæth|mætæzæth]] || [[word:mætæzæj|mætæzæj]] || [[word:mætæzæsh|mætæzæsh]] || [[word:mætæzæ|mætæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:matatazath|matatazath]] || [[word:matatazaj|matatazaj]] || [[word:matatazash|matatazash]] || [[word:matataza|matataza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:matazath|matazath]] || [[word:matazaj|matazaj]] || [[word:matazash|matazash]] || [[word:mataza|mataza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:matafzath|matafzath]] || [[word:matafzaj|matafzaj]] || [[word:matafzash|matafzash]] || [[word:matafzaf|matafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:matazatha|matazatha]] || [[word:matazaja|matazaja]] || [[word:matazasha|matazasha]] || [[word:matazaka|matazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:matazath|matazath]] || [[word:matazaj|matazaj]] || [[word:matazash|matazash]] || [[word:mataza|mataza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:matazathal|matazathal]] || [[word:matazajal|matazajal]] || [[word:matazashal|matazashal]] || [[word:matazakal|matazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:matazathatha|matazathatha]] || [[word:matazajaja|matazajaja]] || [[word:matazashasha|matazashasha]] || [[word:matazaka|matazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:matazathan|matazathan]] || [[word:matazajan|matazajan]] || [[word:matazashan|matazashan]] || [[word:matazakan|matazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:matazathaoro|matazathaoro]] || [[word:matazajaoro|matazajaoro]] || [[word:matazashaoro|matazashaoro]] || [[word:matazakaoro|matazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
